src: This is the fully-functional GNU Radio software-defined radio (SDR) implementation of a LoRa transceiver with all the necessary receiver components to operate correctly even at very low SNRs. This work has been conducted at the Telecommunication Circuits Laboratory, EPFL.
ja: 非常に低いSNRでも正常動作するLoRaトランシーバーの完全機能GNU Radio SDR実装（EPFLの電気通信回路研究室で開発）
